chart.title: Share of adults who are overweight or obese
chart.subtitle: "Overweight" is defined here as a body mass index (BMI) above 25. BMI is a person's weight in kilograms divided by their height in meters squared.
chart.note: To allow for comparisons between countries and over time, this metric is [age-standardized](#dod:age_standardized).
chart.citation: World Health Organization - Global Health Observatory (2025)
